name: iDrive e2
description: iDrive e2 — S3-compatible object storage, the cheapest in this catalog at ~$4/TB/month with 0 egress fees up to 3× monthly storage. Bucket-scoped REST with AWS SigV4. Endpoint hostnames vary per bucket — when you create a bucket, iDrive shows you a dedicated host like 'm1n0.va.idrivee2-21.com' or 'j5z3.la.idrivee2-25.com'. Paste that exact hostname into the 'endpoint' credential. Generate access keys at idrive.com → e2 dashboard → Access Keys.

credential_fields.name: endpoint
credential_fields.label: Endpoint Host
credential_fields.description: Full hostname iDrive assigns to your bucket — e.g. m1n0.va.idrivee2-21.com. Find it in the e2 dashboard on the bucket's overview page (it's the value before the bucket name in the displayed S3 URL). Do not include https:// or the bucket name.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Region
credential_fields.description: SigV4 region. iDrive accepts any non-empty value; common practice is to mirror the geographic indicator from the endpoint host (e.g. 'va' for Virginia → us-east-1, 'la' for Los Angeles → us-west-1).

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: iDrive e2 Access Key
credential_fields.description: From idrive.com → e2 → Access Keys → Create Access Key. Bucket-scoped keys are the safer default.

credential_fields.name: secret_access_key
credential_fields.label: iDrive e2 Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Shown once at key creation. Regenerate the key if lost.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in a bucket (S3-compatible ListObjectsV2). Returns XML; parse Contents[].Key / Size / LastModified, plus IsTruncated + NextContinuationToken for pagination.

prefix.description: Filter to keys starting with this prefix.

continuation-token.description: Pagination cursor from a prior IsTruncated response.

tools.name: put_object
tools.description: Upload an object. Pass content as 'body'; runner sends verbatim with SigV4 integrity hash. Single-PUT cap is 5GB; use multipart for larger.

body.description: Object content. Bytes welcome — the runner sends them verbatim.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download an object. Response body is the raw object bytes (response cap 200MB).

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a single object. Returns 204 on success.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all iDrive e2 buckets visible to the access key. Returns XML; ListAllMyBucketsResult.Buckets.Bucket[] has names + creation dates.
